title: Ask HN: Bedrock,Vertex AI etc. Support Anthropic Models
content:
Is the mechanism more like a smart proxy or do these cloud providers host and serve Anthropic models? if latter, how do they work ? How does Anthropic protect model weights ?

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47971901
Points: 1
# Comments: 0
summary: 用户询问AWS Bedrock和Google Vertex AI等云服务提供商对Anthropic模型的支持机制：是作为智能代理转发请求，还是实际托管和提供模型服务？如果是后者，它们如何运作？Anthropic如何保护模型权重？该问题在Hacker News上发布，目前有1个点赞但无评论。
key_points: 探讨云服务商对Anthropic模型的支持模式
关注模型权重的保护机制
涉及智能代理与直接托管的区别
